## Summary

Describe the behavior changed and why it belongs in SKTR.

## Validation

- [ ] Focused tests added or updated
- [ ] `uv run pytest` passes
- [ ] `uv build` passes when packaging or public metadata changed
- [ ] `git diff --check` passes

## Architecture and compatibility

- [ ] Core remains language-agnostic
- [ ] Rules consume normalized review knowledge, not raw parser data
- [ ] Artifact schema compatibility was considered
- [ ] No credentials, private source, or sensitive diagnostics were added

Note any public API, configuration, plugin contract, artifact, or migration impact.
